mapper.insert: insert into orders (number, status, user_id, address_book_id, order_time, checkout_time, pay_method, pay_status, amount, remark, phone, address, user_name, consignee, sex, cancel_reason, rejection_reason, cancel_time, estimated_delivery_time, delivery_status, delivery_time, pack_amount, package_number, package_status, delivery_fee, shop_id) VALUES (#{number}, #{status}, #{userId}, #{addressBookId}, #{orderTime}, #{checkoutTime}, #{payMethod}, #{payStatus}, #{amount}, #{remark}, #{phone}, #{address}, #{userName}, #{consignee}, #{sex}, #{cancelReason}, #{rejectionReason}, #{cancelTime}, #{estimatedDeliveryTime}, #{deliveryStatus}, #{deliveryTime}, #{packAmount}, #{packageNumber}, #{packageStatus}, #{deliveryFee}, #{shopId})
